inputs.prompt:
Breathtaking Avatar-inspired alien forest at twilight.  
Tall bioluminescent trees with translucent leaves glow soft blue-cyan, illuminating the scene.  
Glowing plants, luminous flowers and floating spores fill the air.  
Graceful blue-skinned Na’vi-like humanoid stands in foreground, tall & slender, subtle markings, expressive eyes.  
Massive ancient trees and hanging vines fade into misty background.  
Rich yet harmonious palette: blues, greens, teals, soft purples.  
Cinematic sci-fi fantasy, ultra-detailed, ethereal & awe-inspiring mood.  
Soft volumetric lighting, professional color grading, high resolution.  
No text, no logos, no watermarks.
